summary: PRED-105 test window expired 2026-04-18; dome status unchanged — schedule re-check in 24–48h
detail: PRED-105 (cucumber growth, 46° copper coils, 14-day window) reached its stated expiry 2026-04-18 with dome badge still reading "PENDING — PROSPECTIVE" at 11:09Z poll and at this analyst run. No measurement data, no PASS/FAIL verdict, no silent drop, no Nhughes09 manual commit in the preceding 23.5h. data/predictions.json PRED-105 already carries our_verdict="pending" and a locked POST-CLOSURE RUBRIC. Decider action: (1) re-assign PRED-105 for a verdict update on the next run that detects a dome status transition; (2) if no transition by 2026-04-21 (72h post-expiry), treat as silent drop and add to data/uncounted-failures.json per rubric item (iii); (3) if dome posts PASS without pre-registered protocol (N, α, blinding, randomization, growth metric), apply rubric item (i) — downgrade to post-hoc/methodology failure; (4) if dome posts null/negative, apply rubric item (iii) — record as falsified. No data/predictions.json patch required today.
